questionHtml: Calculate the total volume of air inhaled during one minute during the highest velocity of the treadmill in this test, giving the units.
markschemeHtml:
a. tidal volume x ventilation rate
OR
litres breath-1 × breath min-1 

b. 186 L (min-1)
